These will likely be either expired messages, random misdirected traffic, or intentional scraping. * @param string $callbackUrl URL to receive click events to your webhook whenever the recipients click on the shortened links * @param bool $continueOnFailure Boolean field to set customer delivery preference when there is a failure in linkShortening service * @param bool $disableHttps Customer's choice to send links with/without \\\"https://\\\" attached to shortened url.
